title: bupleurum trichopodum var. eutrichopodum
intro: Bupleurum trichopodum var. eutrichopodum, also known as Chinese Thorny Bupleurum, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, characterized by its thorny stems and small yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Chinese Thorny Bupleurum include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, flu, and respiratory issues. Chinese Thorny Bupleurum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
